message: Fix up padding after enabling tabs

files.patch:
@@ -10,8 +10,8 @@ background-opacity = 0.95
 background-blur-radius = 20
 macos-titlebar-style = tabs
 #window-colorspace = display-p3
-window-padding-x = 8
-window-padding-y = 8
+window-padding-x = 5
+window-padding-y = 0
 window-padding-balance = true
 
 # Fonts.
